description: 靈風中學數學週2026 - 公式圖像配對題庫（含SVG）

pairs.fcn: a² − b² = (a+b)(a−b)
pairs.svg:
<svg viewBox="0 0 110 110">
      <defs>
        <linearGradient id="ga1" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="100%" y2="100%">
          <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#a78bfa;stop-opacity:0.3"/>
          <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#7c3aed;stop-opacity:0.1"/>
        </linearGradient>
      </defs>
      <rect x="15" y="20" width="80" height="70" rx="6" fill="url(#ga1)" stroke="#7c3aed" stroke-width="9"/>
      <text x="55" y="60" font-size="32" fill="#a78bfa" font-weight="bold" font-family="serif" text-anchor="middle">−</text>
      <text x="55" y="25" font-size="16" fill="#c4b5fd" font-weight="bold" text-anchor="middle">a² − b²</text>
    </svg>

<svg viewBox="0 0 110 110">
      <defs>
        <linearGradient id="gs4" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="100%" y2="100%">
          <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#38bdf8;stop-opacity:0.3"/>
          <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#0284c7;stop-opacity:0.1"/>
        </linearGradient>
      </defs>
      <rect x="15" y="20" width="80" height="70" rx="6" fill="url(#gs4)" stroke="#0284c7" stroke-width="9"/>
      <text x="55" y="55" font-size="24" fill="#38bdf8" font-weight="bold" font-family="sans-serif" text-anchor="middle">σ</text>
      <text x="55" y="80" font-size="11" fill="#7dd3fc" font-family="sans-serif" text-anchor="middle">√(偏差²平均)</text>
    </svg>
